source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Please choose the SMILES expression of the transition-state structure shown in the image, ignoring the arrows. <image_1>

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'shown in the image', so the target structure is image-grounded
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the problem cannot be solved reliably from text alone
the task asks for a SMILES of a depicted transition-state structure, which depends on visual structural details
multi_step: solver must read the chemical structure from the image and map it to the correct SMILES representation
the 4 choices include closely related alternatives, so selection likely requires comparing connectivity and bond-direction details rather than a single lookup
the prompt says to ignore arrows, which adds at least one instruction-following step beyond direct recognition
verifiability: choices are provided and answer_text exactly matches one option, enabling straightforward exact-match checking
answer_type is short_text and answer_present=true, which supports deterministic validation
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and no registry issues are listed

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、图像、答案均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空
综合信号较强：image_dependency_score=0.97，verifiability_score=0.95，适合进入候选池
虽有 smiles_equivalence_notation_risk，但这是表示法风险，不构成核心语义缺失
